DocumentFormat.OpenXml.purpose: Parse report-template content trees and strongly validate writes to copied Word and Excel packages through typed Open XML APIs.
DocumentFormat.OpenXml.securityImpact: Processes user-selected Office package content locally; only validated body/table text and Excel constants are written to temporary copies. Macros, formulas, layout and source files are protected.
DocumentFormat.OpenXml.alternatives: Manual ZIP/XML manipulation would be less safe and harder to validate; Office automation would require a desktop Office dependency.
DocumentFormat.OpenXml.removalStrategy: Remove with file-template report mode or replace with an equivalently maintained Open XML package library.

JsonSchema.Net.purpose: Validate the checked-in public AI JSON schemas in contract tests.
JsonSchema.Net.securityImpact: Test-only schema parsing; no runtime data path.
JsonSchema.Net.alternatives: Hand-written validation would be less complete and harder to audit.
JsonSchema.Net.removalStrategy: Remove when protocol validation moves to an equivalent maintained validator.

Markdig.purpose: Parse CommonMark into an AST for safe native WinUI chat rendering.
Markdig.securityImpact: Runtime parsing of local/provider Markdown; raw HTML, images and automatic external navigation remain disabled.
Markdig.alternatives: The existing handwritten line parser is incomplete; WebView rendering would add a larger browser and script surface.
Markdig.removalStrategy: Replace only with an equivalent maintained AST parser and native renderer.

Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.purpose: Resolve C# symbols and operations for architecture tests.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.securityImpact: Test-only compiler API; not shipped with applications.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.alternatives: Text matching cannot reliably resolve aliases, partial types, or dependency symbols.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.removalStrategy: Remove only if replaced by an equally semantic compiler-based gate.

Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Workspaces.purpose: Provide the C# language service used by MSBuildWorkspace when loading projects.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Workspaces.securityImpact: Test-only compiler workspace support; not shipped with applications.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Workspaces.alternatives: MSBuildWorkspace cannot semantically load C# projects without the language service.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Workspaces.removalStrategy: Remove together with the Roslyn MSBuild architecture gate.

Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuil.purpose: Load the real solution and project graph for semantic architecture tests.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuil.securityImpact: Test-only MSBuild workspace loading; not shipped with applications.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuil.alternatives: Synthetic compilations cannot verify the actual project reference graph.
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuil.removalStrategy: Remove only if the gate moves to an equivalent compiler-integrated analyzer.

Microsoft.Build.Locator.purpose: Select the installed MSBuild toolset before loading the solution in tests.
Microsoft.Build.Locator.securityImpact: Test-only local tool discovery; no runtime data path.
Microsoft.Build.Locator.alternatives: Hard-coded MSBuild paths are machine-specific and unreliable.
Microsoft.Build.Locator.removalStrategy: Remove with MSBuildWorkspace if architecture loading changes.

Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk.purpose: Run repository unit and architecture test projects.
Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk.alternatives: The .NET test host is the standard runner used by the repository.
Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk.removalStrategy: Replace only with a repository-wide test runner migration.

Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK.purpose: Provide the WinUI application and Windows integration runtime.
Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK.securityImpact: Runtime Windows UI dependency with native platform access.
Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK.alternatives: Replacing it requires a separately approved UI platform migration.
Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK.removalStrategy: Remove only through an accepted Windows UI migration proposal.

xunit.alternatives: Other test frameworks offer no current migration benefit.
xunit.removalStrategy: Replace only with a repository-wide test framework migration.

xunit.runner.visualstudio.purpose: Discover and run xUnit tests through dotnet test and CI.
xunit.runner.visualstudio.alternatives: A custom runner would add maintenance without stronger guarantees.
xunit.runner.visualstudio.removalStrategy: Remove together with xUnit or after adopting another runner.
